name: Senolytics safety-table coverage-gap repair
summary: Updates the senolytics coverage assessment with retained source-snapshot locators for the D+Q bone RCT safety table, withdrawal narrative, dosing cadence, and durability discussion, while preserving the remaining adverse-event and cross-human safety extraction gaps.

scope.question: Repair the senolytics safety/durability coverage gap by reconciling current D+Q bone RCT safety-table extraction status and preserving remaining event-term, discontinuation, dosing-cadence, durability, and cross-human safety extraction debt.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks this bounded extraction-refresh repair candidate and its required review lanes.
Refreshes the safety_durability category and senolytics-safety-tables gap with source-snapshot-backed D+Q bone safety locators and explicit remaining extraction debt.
